scenes.description: 一位身穿深色衣物的人在家庭办公室专注使用笔记本电脑，环境温馨安静。
scenes.video_prompt: A person in dark clothing sits focused at a wooden desk in a cozy home office, gently typing on a laptop. Warm ambient lighting creates a calm and productive atmosphere. The background features a bookshelf and soft-furnished furniture. A drink and small office items are neatly placed on the desk. The camera slowly pushes in from a medium close-up to emphasize concentration. Shot with a 50mm lens at f/2.8 for shallow depth of field, natural color grading enhances the warm wood tones and soft shadows.

style_elements.characters: Focused individual in dark clothing, seated posture, hands on keyboard
style_elements.environment: Cozy home office with bookshelf, wooden desk, soft lighting
style_elements.visual_style: Warm, natural tones; soft focus; realistic lighting

scenes.description: 卡通角色驾驶拖拉机进入泥潭，车轮打滑无法前进，气氛紧张。
scenes.video_prompt: Animated scene of a cartoon bear driving a red tractor through a forest path that suddenly sinks into a muddy pit. The wheels spin helplessly, splashing thick brown mud. The bear panics, raising its arms in distress as the vehicle tilts slightly. Surrounding trees loom under gray overcast skies. Expressive facial animation shows frustration and fear. Camera circles the scene dynamically, switching between low-angle shots emphasizing depth and close-ups of spinning tires. Rendered in vibrant 3D animation style with exaggerated physics and dramatic sound effects.

style_elements.characters: Anthropomorphic bear driver with expressive emotions
style_elements.environment: Forest trail turning into deep mud pit under cloudy sky
style_elements.visual_style: Vibrant 3D cartoon style with exaggerated motion and textures
style_elements.camera_movement: Dynamic circling motion with low angles and close-ups

scenes.description: 小兔子下车帮助推车，但泥太滑仍无法脱困，三人被困显得沮丧。
scenes.video_prompt: The little rabbit hops out of the tractor and pushes against the rear wheel with all its strength, but slips in the mud. Mud splatters on its fur as it struggles. The bear and sheep inside look worried. They exchange glances showing disappointment. Rain begins to drizzle, adding to the gloom. Close-up shots capture their messy appearances—mud-covered faces and flattened ears. Camera remains steady at eye level, focusing on emotional expressions. Lighting is dim and diffused, enhancing the sense of helplessness. Stylized 3D animation maintains bright character colors despite dirty surroundings.

style_elements.characters: Rabbit pushing, sheep and bear inside looking distressed
style_elements.environment: Muddy forest road with light rain and puddles
style_elements.visual_style: Expressive 3D cartoon with emotional close-ups and wet surface details
style_elements.camera_movement: Eye-level static and slow tracking shots

scenes.description: 角色想到解决办法，决定清理泥浆，但担心过程会很累。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear wipes mud from its face and suddenly looks inspired. It gestures excitedly while speaking to the others. The rabbit listens attentively, nodding slowly. They begin discussing a plan to dig out the mud around the wheels. Shots alternate between group conversation and wide views of the stuck tractor. The mood shifts from despair to cautious hope. Soft sunlight breaks through clouds symbolizing optimism. Camera uses over-the-shoulder framing during dialogue and gentle pans across the scene. Animation style retains vivid colors with enhanced texture detail on wet soil.

style_elements.characters: Bear gesturing ideas, rabbit listening, sheep observing
style_elements.environment: Partially sunlit muddy trail with visible tire tracks
style_elements.visual_style: Hopeful tone with symbolic lighting shift and expressive animation
style_elements.camera_movement: Over-the-shoulder cuts and slow panoramic pans

scenes.description: 角色寻找工具未果，焦急等待，工具不见引发困扰。
scenes.video_prompt: The characters search frantically around the tractor—under seats, behind wheels, in backpacks—but find nothing. Frustration grows as they look at each other in confusion. The bear scratches its head, puzzled. Cutaways show empty tool bags and muddy ground where tools might have fallen. Time-lapse-style editing increases tension. Camera shakes slightly during searches to convey urgency. Sound design emphasizes rustling and muffled voices. Lighting returns to overcast, reinforcing setback. Animated expressions are comically exaggerated—wide eyes, drooping ears, slumped shoulders.

style_elements.characters: Bear, rabbit, and sheep searching with growing frustration
style_elements.environment: Cluttered tractor cabin and surrounding muddy area
style_elements.visual_style: Exaggerated cartoon expressions with tense pacing
style_elements.camera_movement: Shaky handheld-style motion and quick cutaways

scenes.description: 终于找到新发明的吸尘器，准备用来吸走泥浆。
scenes.video_prompt: The bear triumphantly pulls a large, futuristic vacuum cleaner from a hidden compartment in the tractor. It shines under a sudden beam of sunlight. Excited chatter erupts among the characters. Close-ups show intricate dials and glowing indicators on the device. The rabbit inspects it curiously while the sheep holds cables. Wide shot reveals the machine being wheeled toward the mud. Camera rises slowly in an upward tilt to highlight discovery and innovation. Bright color palette returns, symbolizing renewed energy. Sci-fi cartoon design blends whimsy with pseudo-technology.

style_elements.characters: Bear proud, rabbit curious, sheep assisting with cables
style_elements.environment: Tractor with hidden compartment, spotlight effect on device
style_elements.visual_style: Whimsical sci-fi cartoon with glowing tech elements
style_elements.camera_movement: Upward tilt revealing invention and rising hope

scenes.description: 连接吸尘器电源并启动，开始吸取泥浆，场面变得活跃。
scenes.video_prompt: The rabbit connects a power cable from the tractor’s battery to the vacuum. Sparks briefly flash as it powers up. A loud hum fills the air as the machine activates. Thick mud is sucked violently into the transparent chamber with swirling motion. Characters cheer and jump back from splatter. Dynamic camera movements follow flying debris and rotating hoses. Slow-motion captures mud particles lifting off the ground. Lighting pulses slightly with machine rhythm. Vibrant visual effects enhance suction force. Group reactions are joyful and energetic, restoring morale.

style_elements.characters: All three operating and reacting to machine activation
style_elements.environment: Active mud removal site with mechanical operation
style_elements.visual_style: High-energy cartoon with particle effects and dynamic lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Fast tracking and slow-motion action shots

scenes.description: 泥浆被吸光后，小熊推动拖拉机成功脱困。
scenes.video_prompt: With the mud cleared, the bear braces itself and pushes the rear of the tractor. The wheels slowly turn and gain traction. The vehicle lurches forward, breaking free with a satisfying thud. Cheers erupt from the group. Slow-motion highlights the moment of release—mud cracking, metal creaking, grass flattening. Wide-angle shot captures the entire scene as the tractor rolls onto solid ground. Golden-hour lighting bathes the characters in warm glow. Camera orbits the group in celebration, emphasizing unity and success. Animation style peaks in emotional expression and physical comedy.

style_elements.characters: Bear pushing, rabbit and sheep celebrating
style_elements.environment: Now-cleared muddy spot transitioning to dry path
style_elements.visual_style: Triumphant golden-hour lighting with celebratory animation

scenes.description: 大家上车继续旅程，准备为小羊送甘草。
scenes.video_prompt: The trio climbs back into the tractor, waving toward the camera. The engine roars to life as they drive down the forest path. Wind blows through their fur, now partially cleaned. Sunlight filters through leaves above, creating dappled patterns on the road. Dashboard lights blink normally again. Rear view shows the empty mud pit fading into distance. Gentle music resumes. Camera follows alongside in smooth lateral tracking shot, then lifts into aerial drone-style view. Warm, inviting color grade reinforces safety and progress.

style_elements.characters: Three characters relaxed and happy in tractor
style_elements.environment: Sun-dappled forest path returning to normalcy
style_elements.visual_style: Peaceful return journey with natural lighting and fluid motion
style_elements.camera_movement: Lateral tracking and rising aerial perspective

scenes.description: 到达目的地，分发干草，最后大家一起跳舞庆祝。
scenes.video_prompt: The tractor arrives at a sunny meadow where hungry lambs rush forward. Bales of hay are unloaded and shared joyfully. Lambs munch eagerly as adults smile. Suddenly, upbeat music swells and the group begins dancing—a lively circle dance with hopping and clapping. Confetti-like leaves fall from trees. Camera spins around the dancers in rhythmic sync with the beat. Final wide shot includes all characters laughing under blue sky. Color saturation peaks, radiating happiness. Ending freeze-frame with text: 'Everyone helps!' in playful font.

style_elements.characters: All characters including lambs dancing joyfully
style_elements.environment: Sunny meadow with scattered hay bales and green grass
style_elements.visual_style: Joyful, saturated colors with festive animation
style_elements.camera_movement: Spinning circular motion synced to dance rhythm
